code: import React,{useState}from"react";import{useNavigate,Navigate}from"react-router-dom";import auth from"../../services/authService";import"./Admin.css";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const AdminLogin=()=>{const navigate=useNavigate();const[username,setUsername]=useState("");const[password,setPassword]=useState("");const[error,setError]=useState(null);if(auth.isAuthenticated()){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Navigate,{to:"/admin/add-customer",replace:true});}const submit=async e=>{e.preventDefault();setError(null);try{await auth.login(username,password);navigate("/admin/add-customer");}catch(err){setError(err.message||"Login failed");}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"admin-login-page",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"admin-form-card",style:{maxWidth:420,margin:"60px auto"},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{style:{marginBottom:12},children:"Admin Login"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:submit,className:"admin-form",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"admin-form-group",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{className:"admin-label",children:"Username"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{className:"admin-input",value:username,onChange:e=>setUsername(e.target.value)})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"admin-form-group",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{className:"admin-label",children:"Password"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"password",className:"admin-input",value:password,onChange:e=>setPassword(e.target.value)})]}),error&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{color:"#ef4444",fontWeight:600},children:error}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{marginTop:6},children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",className:"admin-btn",children:"Login"})})]})]})});};export default AdminLogin;
